title: The Nightmare 000
body:
😨 The Nightmare — Sleep No More

This mod adds a deadly new creature — The Nightmare — to your Minecraft world.

Every time you try to sleep in a bed, there’s a 30% chance that The Nightmare will awaken instead.

Once it spawns, there’s no escape:

It moves faster than anything you’ve seen.

It strikes harder than any other mob.

And it kills you in just one hit — no matter what armor or gear you have.

Defeating it? Forget it. There’s no way to kill The Nightmare. Your only hope is to avoid summoning it by never sleeping.

If you’re brave (or foolish) enough to challenge your own fears, download the mod and try to survive.

⚠️ This mod requires GeckoLib and is built for Minecraft 1.20.1. Please install GeckoLib before playing!

🛏️ Stay awake. Stay alive. Or face The Nightmare…
